Description

org.episteme.social.geography
Provides classes for social geography, human settlements, and mapping.
org.episteme.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis.

  • Uses of EarthCoordinate in org.episteme.natural.earth.coordinates

    Classes in org.episteme.natural.earth.coordinates that implement EarthCoordinate
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    AERCoordinate
    Azimuth-Elevation-Range (AER) local spherical coordinate system.
    class 
    AlbersEqualAreaCoordinate
    Represents a coordinate in the Albers Equal-Area Conic projection.
    class 
    BonneCoordinate
    Represents a coordinate in the Bonne projection.
    class 
    CassiniSoldnerCoordinate
    Represents a coordinate in the Cassini-Soldner projection.
    final class 
    ECEFCoordinate
    Earth-Centered, Earth-Fixed (ECEF) Cartesian coordinate system.
    final class 
    ENUCoordinate
    East-North-Up (ENU) topocentric coordinate system.
    class 
    GeodeticCoordinate
    Represents a point on the Earth defined by latitude, longitude, and height.
    class 
    LambertAzimuthalEqualAreaCoordinate
    Represents a coordinate in the Lambert Azimuthal Equal-Area (LAEA) projection.
    final class 
    LambertConformalConicCoordinate
    Lambert Conformal Conic (LCC) projection coordinate.
    final class 
    MercatorCoordinate
    Mercator projection coordinate.
    final class 
    MGRSCoordinate
    Military Grid Reference System (MGRS) coordinate.
    class 
    PolyconicCoordinate
    Represents a coordinate in the American Polyconic projection.
    final class 
    UPSCoordinate
    Universal Polar Stereographic (UPS) coordinate.
    final class 
    UTMCoordinate
    Universal Transverse Mercator (UTM) coordinate.

    Interface

    EarthCoordinate
    Base interface for all Earth coordinate systems.

    Subclasses with type arguments of type EarthCoordinate in org.episteme.social.geography
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GeoPath
    Represents a geographical path, which can consist of multiple disjoint segments (MultiLineString).
    class 
    GeoPolygon
    A geographical polygon supporting multiple disjoint regions (exclaves) and holes (enclaves).
    Classes in org.episteme.social.geography that implement interfaces with type arguments of type EarthCoordinate
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Address
    Represents a mailing or physical address for a location.
    class 
    GeoBoundingBox
    Geographic bounding box implementation.
    static class 
    GeoPath.SimpleGeoPath
    Inner class representing a single continuous path segment.
    static class 
    GeoPolygon.SimpleGeoPolygon
    Inner class representing a simple polygon (1 exterior + N interiors).
